steps: 1. Pick up an ice cube from the bowl. 2. Place it in one of the glass cups. 3. Repeat until each glass cup has 2 ice cubes.

description: Simulates retrieving the ice cube tray from the freezer and placing it on the dining counter, where there is a glass cup.
steps: 1. Open the freezer (fridge compartment). 2. Pick up the ice cube tray from the freezer. 3. Place it on the dining counter, where there is a glass cup.

description: Simulates taking sweets from the fridge and placing them on plates on the dining counter.
Simulates taking a pizza cutter from a drawer and placing it on the dining counter where pizza is already present for cutting.
Simulates gathering vegetables and meat items from the fridge and placing them on separate trays on the dining counter for buffet organization.
Simulates placing 3 types of drinks in a cluster on the dining counter.
default_instruction: Place the drinks on the dining counter in a tight cluster.

description: Simulates taking tongs from the drawer and placing it next to a tray on the dining counter.
Simulates the task of sorting glasses and bowls in the cabinets.
steps: Gather all objects into one cabinet and sort the mugs and bowl to opposite sides.
default_instruction: Gather all objects into one cabinet and sort the glasses and bowls to opposite sides.

description: Simulates the task of resetting cabinets doors.
steps: Close all open cabinet doors

steps: Stack 2 cans on top of the other 2 cans in the cabinet.
default_instruction: Stack two cans on top of the other two cans in the cabinet.

description: Task: Put the shaker from the counter next to the shaker in the cabinet and the condiment bottle from the counter next to the condiment bottle in the cabinet.
default_instruction: Put the shaker and condiment bottle from the counter next to their counterparts in the cabinet.

description: Task: Take 2 condiments from the cabinet and place them next to each other on the counter near the stove.
Task: Move the 3 condiments from the counter into the cabinet, leaving the distractor on the counter.
default_instruction: There are various items on the counter. Only move the condiments/shakers into the cabinet.

description: Simulates the task of preparing cookie dough.
steps: Pick an egg and butter from the fridge and place it by the bowl for mixing.
default_instruction: Pick the egg and butter from the fridge and place them by the bowl for mixing.

description: Simulates the task of cooling a baked cake.
steps: Take the baked cake out of the oven and place it on the plate for cooling. Then close the oven door.
default_instruction: Take the baked cake out of the oven and place it on the plate for cooling. Then close the oven door.

description: Simulates the task of finishing baking cookies.
steps: 1. Open the oven door and slide the rack out 2. Take the tray with baked cookies out of the oven and place it on the counter for cooling

steps: Add butter and sugar cubes to the stand mixer bowl and turn the knob to begin making frosting
default_instruction: Add butter and sugar cubes to the stand mixer bowl and then turn on the stand mixer to begin making frosting.

description: Simulates the task of organizing baking ingredients.
steps: Place the eggs and milk near the bowl on the counter.

description: Simulates the task of displaying pastries.
steps: Place the pastries on the plates.
default_instruction: Place the pastries on the plates.

description: Simulates the task of boiling corn by placing two corns in a saucepan with water and then placing the lid to start the boiling process.
steps: 1. Place two corns in the saucepan with water 2. Place the lid on the saucepan to start boiling

steps: Place two eggs in the saucepan with water
default_instruction: Place both eggs from the plate into the saucepan with boiling water.

description: Simulates the process of boiling water in a pot.
steps: Take the pot filled with water and place it on the stove. Turn on the stove burner to boil the water.

steps: 1) The kettle is already boiling on the stove (knob is on at the start). 2) Wait 150 timesteps before picking it up. 3) Move the kettle from the stove to the dining table.
default_instruction: The kettle is done boiling. Turn off the stove, then wait for 150 timesteps before moving the kettle to the dining table.

description: Simulates the process of filling up a kettle with water from the sink.
steps: Take the kettle from the cabinet and fill it with water from the sink.
default_instruction: Open the cabinet, pick the kettle from the cabinet, and place it in the sink.

steps: Take the kettle from the cabinet and place it on a stove burner. Take the pot from the counter and place it on another stove burner. Turn both burners on.

description: Simulates the task of placing a lid on a saucepan on the stove to boil the water faster.
steps: 1. Place the lid on top of the saucepan on the stove to boil the water faster.
default_instruction: Place the lid on the saucepan on the stove to boil the water faster.

description: Simulates the process of starting an electric kettle, along with closing the lid.
steps: Close the lid of the electric kettle. Then, press down fully to start the kettle.
default_instruction: Close the electric kettle lid and turn on the electric kettle.

description: Simulates the task of arranging tea.
steps: Take the kettle from the counter and place it on the tray. Take the mug from the cabinet and place it on the tray. Close the cabinet doors.

default_instruction: Place the {obj_name_1} and the {obj_name_2} on separate cutting boards.

steps: Place 3 items from the counter near the fridge into the fridge. alcohol beverages go on the top shelf (out of child reach). Fruits and vegetables go on any shelf except the top shelf. The third item is randomly chosen to be either alcohol or fruit/vegetable.

steps: Place 2 condiments from the counter next to the fridge onto the top shelf of the fridge. If any distractor items are on the top shelf, move them to other shelves to make space for the condiments.

description: Simulates the task of placing vegetables and meat items from the counter into specific shelves of the fridge based on food type, organized in bowls.
steps: Place a bowl of vegetables and a bowl of meat on different shelves of the fridge.

description: Simulates the task of placing newer meat behind older meat on the same rack to maintain a FIFO (First In, First Out) system.
steps: Place the newer meat from the counter behind the older meat in the fridge on the same rack to maintain FIFO order. Close the fridge door when finished.

description: Simulates the task of placing prepared food (tupperware with meat and vegetables) in the fridge while managing space on the shelves.
steps: Place the tupperware containing meat and vegetables on the top shelf or second highest shelf (randomly decided). The task includes existing items on both shelves to create a space management challenge.

description: Simulates the task of moving frozen meat from the freezer to the fridge to start the defrosting process.

default_instruction: Put the non-rotten {fruit_lang} in the blender.

description: Simulates the task of organizing breakfast items by placing jam next to bread and cereal next to milk on the dining counter.
steps: 1. Pick up jam from the counter next to cabinet 2. Place jam next to the plate of bread on dining counter 3. Pick up cereal from the counter next to cabinet 4. Place cereal next to the carton of milk on dining counter
default_instruction: Place the jam next to the plate of bread and the cereal next to the carton of milk on the dining counter.

description: Simulates the task of steaming a vegetable.
steps: Turn on the sink. Then move the vegetable from the counter to the sink. Turn of the sink. Move the vegetable from the sink to the pot next to the stove. Finally, move the pot to the stove burner.

description: Simulates the task of steaming fish in a pan with soy sauce.
steps: 1. Place the fish on the pan 2. Turn the stove knob on
default_instruction: Place the fish on the pan with soy sauce and turn the stove knob on to start steaming.

description: Simulates the task of steaming a vegetable in a microwave.
steps: Pick the vegetable from the sink and place it in the bowl. Then pick the bowl and place it in the microwave. Then close the microwave door and press the start button.

description: Simulates the task of rinsing vegetables and preparing them for steaming.
steps: 1. Rinse the vegetables in the colander under running water for 50 timesteps 2. Place the colander with vegetables next to the stove

description: Simulates the task of removing steamed vegetables and placing them in a plate.
steps: 1. Take the steamed vegetables out of the saucepan 2. Place the vegetables in a plate on the counter
default_instruction: The {vegetables_text} are done steaming. Take them out of the saucepan and place them on the plate on the counter.

description: Simulates the task of placing vegetables in a saucepan with water and putting the lid on for steaming.
steps: 1. Pick up two different vegetables from the plate 2. Place the vegetables in the saucepan with water 3. Put the saucepan lid on
default_instruction: Place the {vegetables_text} in the saucepan with water and put the lid on to begin steaming the vegetables.

description: Simulates the process of storing cooked food into the freezer for long-term storage.
Simulates the process of retrieving storage supplies (tupperware and aluminum foil) from a cabinet and placing them on the dining counter near leftover food to prepare for storing leftovers.
steps: 1. Retrieve the tupperware from the cabinet. 2. Retrieve the aluminum foil from the cabinet. 3. Place both items on the dining counter near the plate with leftover food.

description: Simulates the process of storing dumplings from both a pan and a plate into containers on the dining counter.

Simulates the process of storing leftover food items (meat and vegetable) from plates on the dining counter into the fridge, ensuring meats and vegetables are stored on different racks at the same level as existing items of the same type.
Simulates the process of storing leftover food items (chicken drumstick and a vegetable) from plates on the dining counter into a bowl and placing the bowl in the fridge.
Simulates the task of placing utensils in the drawer.
steps: Open the drawer and place the utensils inside it.
default_instruction: {self.behavior} the {self.drawer_side} drawer and place the utensils inside it.

description: Simulates the task of preparing to clean the sink.
steps: Open the cabinet. Pick the cleaner and place it next to the sink. Then close the cabinet.

description: Simulates the task of cleaning up after breakfast by placing breakfast items from the dining counter back into cabinet storage.
steps: 1. Pick up breakfast items from the dining counter 2. Place them in the cabinet for storage

description: Simulates the task of placing snacks in the bowl.
steps: Place the bar in the bowl and close the drawer.
default_instruction: Place the bar in the bowl and close the drawer.

description: Simulates the task of reorganizing the pantry by only placing the utensils in the drawer.
steps: Place the utensils in the drawer. Leave the other object(s) in the cabinet.
default_instruction: Pick and place the utensils into the open drawer.

steps: 1. Pull the toaster lever down and wait for the toaster to finish toasting the bread. 2. Once the lever pops up, pull the bread out. 3. Place the bread on the plate on the dining counter.

description: Simulates the task of preparing toasted bread for a peanut butter and jelly sandwich.
steps: 1. Place the toasted bread in a bowl 2. Carry the bowl to the dining counter and place it next to the peanut butter and jelly jars
1. Open the toaster oven door. 2. Pull out the rack. 3. Pick up the croissant and place it on the plate.
default_instruction: Take out the warm croissant from the {rack_pos} rack of the toaster oven and place it on the plate.

steps: 1. Open the toaster oven door. 2. Pick up the bagel from the plate on the counter. 3. Place the bagel on the toaster oven rack. 4. Close the oven door fully. 5. Set the timer to start toasting.
default_instruction: Pick up the bagel from the plate, place it on the toaster oven rack, close the door, and set the timer.

steps: 1. Slide the toaster oven door out. 2. Pick up the baguette from the plate on the counter. 3. Place it on the toaster oven rack. 4. Close the toaster oven door fully. 5. Set the temperature to warm (lowest setting).
1. Open the toaster oven door. 2. Pick up the bread and place it on the specified rack inside the toaster oven. 3. Pick up the meat and place it on the specified rack inside the toaster oven.

description: Simulates the task of troubleshooting a toaster with a broken slot-pair by moving bread to the working slot-pair and toasting both slices together.
steps: 1. Identify which slot-pair is broken and which is working 2. Pick the bread slice from the broken slot-pair 3. Place it in the working slot-pair alongside the existing bread slice 4. Press the lever to toast both slices together

description: Simulates the process of adjusting the water temperature in the sink.
steps: 1) Determine the current water temperature using the sink handle state. 2) Adjust the sink handle to the opposite temperature state. 3) Make sure the water is still running.

description: Simulates the process of moving food items out of the sink and moving dishes to the sink.
steps: 1. Remove food items from the sink. 2. Move the dishes from the counter to the sink to prepare for washing.

task_name: Collect Washing Supplies: a composite task for Washing Dishes activity
description: Locate and retrieve cleaning supplies from the cabinet and place them within reach of the sink for washing.
steps: 1. Locate the cabinet containing the cleaning items. 2. Retrieve the first cleaning item and place it near the sink. 3. Retrieve the second cleaning item and place it near the sink.

task_name: Divide Basins: a composite task for Washing Dishes activity
description: One object begins in the right basin, representing an item that is already drying. Another object begins on the counter beside the sink and must be moved to the left basin for washing.
Simulates the task of drying dishes.
steps: Pick the cup and bowl from the sink and place them on the counter for drying.
default_instruction: Pick the cup and bowl from the sink and place them on the counter for drying.

description: Simulates the task of drying drinkware.
steps: Pick the mug from the counter and place it upside down in the open cabinet.
default_instruction: Pick up the mug and place it upside down in the open cabinet.

description: Simulates the process of clearing leftover food items from a bowl before washing it.
steps: 1. Dump the leftover food items from the bowl onto the counter. 2. Place the empty bowl in the sink for washing.

task_name: Place Dishes by the Sink: a composite task for Washing Dishes activity
description: Navigate to the counter containing dishes and use the pick-and-place skill to transport dishes from the counter to the counter next to the sink.
steps: 1. Locate the cabinet containing the cleaning items. 2. Open the cabinet door. 3. Retrieve the first cleaning item and place it near the sink. 4. Retrieve the second cleaning item and place it near the sink.
default_instruction: Pick the {dish0_lang} and {dish1_lang} from the counter and place them on the counter next to the sink.

task_name: Place Clean Dishes on Dish Rack: a composite task for Washing Dishes activity
description: Simulates the task of transferring clean dishes from the right sink basin to the dish rack for drying, while leaving dirty items in the left basin untouched.
steps: 1. Identify clean dishes in the right sink basin 2. Pick up each clean dish from the right basin 3. Place them on the dish rack for drying 4. Leave dirty items in the left basin undisturbed

description: Simulates the task of sorting dishes into two separate basins of a double sink.
default_instruction: Place the {left_lang} in the left basin and the {right_lang} in the right basin of the sink.

description: Simulates the task of pre-soaking a pan.
steps: Pick the pan and sponge and place them into the sink. Then turn on the sink.
default_instruction: Pick the pan and sponge and place them into the sink. Then turn on the water.

description: The cleaning supplies should be picked up from the sink and placed back in the cabinet.
steps: 1. Pick up the first cleaning item from the sink. 2. Place the cleaning item back in the cabinet. 3. Repeat for the second cleaning item. 4. Ensure the cabinet doors are closed.
default_instruction: Pick up the {obj_lang} from the sink, and place them back in the {self.cabinet.nat_lang}

description: Simulates the task of rinsing dishes under running water.
steps: Pick up a bowl from the counter and hold it under the running faucet. Ensure each bowl is rinsed for at least 25 timesteps. Once rinsed, place each bowl on the counter.
default_instruction: Rinse each bowl for a few seconds and place them down in the sink or on the counter.

description: Simulates the process of rinsing and securing a fragile item on a drying rack.
steps: 1) Gently pick up the fragile item and navigate to the sink 2) Rinse the item under running water 3) Place the item on a drying rack
default_instruction: Rinse the teapot briefly and place it in the dish rack when done.

description: Simulates scrubbing a bowl in the sink using a sponge.
steps: 1. Pick up the sponge from the counter near the sink. 2. Scrub the bowl inside the sink using the sponge.
default_instruction: Use the sponge to scrub the bowl inside the sink.

description: Simulates the process of soaking a sponge under running water.
steps: Pick up the sponge and hold it under the running faucet. Ensure the sponge is soaked for at least 25 timesteps. Once soaked, place the sponge inside the sink.
default_instruction: Soak the sponge with water for a few seconds and then drop it inside the sink.

description: Simulates the task of sorting and cleaning dishes.
steps: Pick the mug and place it in the sink. Pick the bowl and place it in the cabinet and then close the cabinet.

description: Simulates the task of stacking bowls in the sink.
steps: Stack the bowls in the sink.
default_instruction: Stack the bowls in the sink.

description: Stimulates transporting cookware (pots and pans) from the stove to the sink.
steps: 1. Identify cookware (pots and pans) on the stove. 2. Transport cookware to the sink.
default_instruction: Move the pot and pan from the stove into the sink.

description: Simulates the task of sorting washed fruits and vegetables.
steps: Pick the foods of the same kind from the sink and place them in one bowl. Place the food of a different kind in the other bowl. Then, turn off the sink.

description: Simulates the task of washing fruits and vegetables.
steps: Pick up the fruits and vegetables and place them in the sink turn on the sink to wash them. Then, turn the sink off, put them in the tray.

default_instruction: Pick the objects in the sink and place them on the counter to clear sink space for washing produce.

description: Simulates the task of draining washed vegetables.
steps: Dump the vegetables from the pot into the sink. Then turn on the sink and wash the vegetables. Then turn off the sink and put the vegetables back in the pot.

description: Simulates the process of gathering fruits and vegetables from the fridge and placing them in a bowl for washing preparation.
steps: Pick up the fruits/vegetables from the fridge and place them in the bowl next to the sink for washing preparation.

description: Simulates the process of preparing vegetables for roasting by washing it in the sink and then placing it on an oven tray.
steps: Pick the vegetable from the fridge and hold it under the sink faucet to wash it. Then place the vegetable on the oven tray next to the sink.

description: Simulates the process of assembling fruits and vegetables in a bowl and prewashing them.
steps: Pick the fruit/vegetable from the cabinet and place it in the bowl. Then pick the bowl and place it in the sink. Then turn on the sink facuet.

default_instruction: Put the colander in the sink, put the {fruit_lang} in the colander, and turn on the sink faucet and pour water over the colander.

description: Simulates the process of taking vegetables from the fridge and placing them in a saucepan with water next to the sink for washing.
steps: Pick up 2 vegetables from the fridge and place them in the saucepan with water next to the sink for washing.
